allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("specs", "tests", "user-stories", "test-results", ".playwright-mcp", ".claude"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { Write-Output "=== $p ==="; if \(Test-Path "c:\\Users\\HP\\Desktop\\Agentic_QA_Automation_Pipeline\\$p"\) { Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\Users\\HP\\Desktop\\Agentic_QA_Automation_Pipeline\\$p" -Recurse -Force | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\("c:\\Users\\HP\\Desktop\\Agentic_QA_Automation_Pipeline\\", ""\) } } })

PowerShell($root = "c:\\Users\\HP\\Desktop\\Agentic_QA_Automation_Pipeline"; $toRemove = @\("user-stories", "specs", "tests", "test-results", ".playwright-mcp", "checkout-complete.png"\); foreach \($item in $toRemove\) { $full = Join-Path $root $item; if \(Test-Path $full\) { Remove-Item -Path $full -Recurse -Force; Write-Output "Removed: $item" } else { Write-Output "Not found: $item" } })
